hotel_description:
"Welcoming guests with its bright red tiles, Indochine-style architecture and an outdoor swimming pool of nearly 5,000 square yards embracing the resort's premises, Vinpearl Resort  &  Spa Phu Quoc offers an experi-ence journey full of characteristic natural flavors of the pearl island. That's walking on the beach while watching the brilliant "party of lights" on the horizon, the feeling of refreshment and cooling down immediately when setting foot on the green premises here after a long day of exploring, or relaxing on a lazy chair to  watch a family favorite movie at the beach cinema. Unmissable experiences here include savoring a seafood buffet with live music and magnificent sunset views at Pepper restaurant by the sea, and enjoying a unique Balinese massage at a spa hut on the tranquil."

Boasting an outdoor pool and a private beach area, Vinpearl Resort & Spa Phu Quoc features modern and luxurious accommodations with free WiFi access throughout the property. It has a 24-hour front desk, business center and meeting/banquet facilities.

Strategically located, the resort is 29 mi from Tranh Waterfall and 23 mi from Ham Ninh Fishing Village. Phu Quoc International Airport is accessible within a 21 mi drive.

Elegantly furnished, air-conditioned rooms are equipped with a wardrobe, in-room safe, a mini-bar, seating area and a flat-screen TV with cable channels. The private bathroom includes shower facility, hairdryer and free toiletries.

Indulge in a pampering massage at the spa, or enjoy a session of karaoke on site. Luggage storage, ticketing and laundry services are also available, while car rentals, airport transfers and shuttle services can be arranged at a surcharge.

Housing three restaurants, guests will be served with a delectable spread of local and Western cuisines. After-meal drinks can be enjoyed at the bar, while room service options are provided for guests’ convenience.

Note: With the announcement of the Kien Giang Tourism Department, all passengers arriving in Phu Quoc need to have a negative Covid-19 test result within 24 hours. Therefore, please conduct the test and show the test results when you come to check-in at Vinpearl.

hotel_description:
Located on the southern and secluded stretch of Long Beach, InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort offers 459 elegantly furnished accommodations in the beautiful tropical Phu Quoc island. The resort houses an award-winning HARNN Heritage Spa, a sky bar INK 360 and 5 restaurants. Guests can enjoy free WiFi access in entire area.

All spacious rooms, villas and suites feature air conditioning, a private balcony, sofa and flat-screen TV. A personal safe, mini-bar and tea/coffee maker are included for your convenience. Ironing facilities and a tumble dryer are also available. Private bathroom comes with a bathtub, hairdryer and free toiletries.

Culinary experience varies from different food outlets, including Sora & Umi, Lava, Sea Shack, Ombra and Pearl Lounge. Guests can enjoy international buffet breakfast, as well as Japanese and Vietnamese dishes for lunch and dinner at Sora & Umi, while Lava offers seafood and aged beer in a beachfront setting. Sea Shack serves a selection of barbecue dishes, while Ombra features Italian cuisine. Unwind with a refreshing cocktail at INK 360, the highest sky bar in Phu Quoc, with stunning ocean views.

Staff at the 24-hour front desk are happy to assist you with day tour or custom-made activity arrangements. A business center, kids' club and children's playground, as well as fitness center area featured.

InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort is a 15-minute drive from Phu Quoc International Airport and a 20-minute drive from Duong Dong town.

*Please note that currently our breakfast offering will be either buffet breakfast, assisted breakfast or a la carte breakfast depending on the situation.
